connection: Four are the first word of a recognized historical or geological age: Iron Age, Bronze Age, Stone Age, Ice Age. "Copper Age" is not the standard English name — the correct term is the Chalcolithic.
hints: Think about named periods of human history or Earth's geology.
Four of these precede AGE to name a recognized era.
Iron Age, Bronze Age, Stone Age, and Ice Age are all standard terms. "Copper Age" is not — historians call it the Chalcolithic or Eneolithic.
